tweets.text:
I DD'd 56 startups in one night with Claude.

Investment-grade dossier: 8 dimensions, 7 parallel AI agents, panoramic site + DD table + Word reports — auto-deployed.

Here's how 🧵

Why was this hard?

A proper DD takes ~30 min per startup. 56 × 30 = 28 hours of solo work.

VCs spread 5 analysts over a week to do this.

A single founder can't.
But a single founder + Claude can.

Insight:

It's actually a scheduling problem.

If 7 analysts ran in parallel, 28h collapses to ~30min.

I don't have 5 analysts.

But Claude Code lets me send 7 sub-agents in a SINGLE message — they truly run concurrently.

What I had walking out of the demo day:

• 22 project-card screenshots
• 1 photo of the exhibit wall (the index)
• 1 official WeChat article with full team bios

That's it. No founder Twitter follows, no warm intros.

I wrapped the workflow into a Claude Code Skill. 5 phases:

0. inventory the assets
1. extract structured JSON (with naming cross-checks)
2. panoramic landing page + first Word report
3. 7 parallel DD agents (the core)
4. merge → DD table + CSV + Word
5. deploy to Cloudflare

The 7-agent fan-out is the magic moment.

One message → 7 sub-agents, each owning ~8 projects.

Every agent fills the same 8-dimension DD JSON: site status, GitHub activity, team score, moat, comps, TAM, valuation range, verdict.

Harness pings me as each finishes.

Counter-intuitive detail:

Valuation hallucinates if you let agents price in a vacuum.

So the skill INJECTS a 25-vertical pre-money comp table into every agent's prompt.

Now every quote is anchored: "$15-30M, comp: InstaChip Seed."

No more $1B for a stealth team of 2.

Results across 54 of the 56 (2 had insufficient info):

• 11 strong-buy ★★★★★
• 20 watch ★★★★
• 18 monitor ★★★
• 4 high-risk ★★
• 1 not-enough-info ★

It's a healthy pyramid.

If all 56 came back ★★★★★ — that wouldn't be DD, it'd be a fan letter.

What this changes:

DD used to require: 1 PM + 5 analysts + 1 editor + 1 week.

Now: 1 person + Claude + 30 minutes.

Not "AI replaces analysts." Rather: the kind of analysis that used to need a team is now within reach of a curious solo. Same for journalists, GPs, scouts.

Made the full pipeline open source — skill + scripts + first-run reference dataset (56 projects, 54 DD entries).

Drop your next demo day's project cards in. 30 min later it's a dossier.

Repo: github.com/zhanglunet/demo-day-dossier
Live: qiji-roadshow-2026.pages.dev
